narrative:
Chatham TWP township has 1,676 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.9 percentage points.
